memories.title: Throwing handlers
memories.description: New handlers throw HttpError instances and rely on middleware.
memories.body:
## New convention

Handlers now throw `HttpError` and the global middleware maps it to JSON. Literal safety: </script> must stay data, not HTML.

conflict.summary: Existing memory says handlers return Result values instead of throwing.

memories.title: Result errors
memories.description: Handlers return Result values and do not throw for expected failures.
memories.existingBody:
## Current rule

Handlers return `Result` values; expected failures are not thrown.
